{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230448530D25D4520F1CC218AFE1"}"},"total":745},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7284203177037382460","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常不错，剧情流程，人物性格刻画很有特点！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695986914,"group_id":"7275990257420471330","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一枚吃货作家，欢迎拐走！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1I1/j043B6xIwP2djUel5w=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/41cf69ed199c4533ad04677334f28584~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791010&x-signature=A8I5dqMRkxDrACj5M7D%2Frl1ObKg%3D","user_id":"102805389920","user_name":"序利亚子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102805389920","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7275990257420471330","book_info":{"abstract":"【小人物逆袭+赌石+鉴宝+捡漏+爽文+金手指透视】
　　高阳，一个普通上班族，无意中发现快结婚的女朋友居然和自己最好的哥们私通。
　　因为愤怒骑车乱穿马路，被车给撞进了医院，机缘巧合下得到透视能力。
　　他的命运从此改变，人生历程重新谱写。
　　从此捡漏，鉴宝，赌石成为他的主旋律，携美共游是他的爱好，古玩字画，翡翠玉石，一眼定乾坤，开启了他的辉煌人生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6067bf37fc350828b14184996bd272f6","author":"迟暮流年","author_id":"","book_id":"7275990257420471330","book_name":"透视巅峰，赌石大亨","book_short_name":"透视神曈","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7275990392049238528","read_count":"25603","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3195407"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"1514","tags":"都市日常,都市,神豪,多女主,都市异能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/06faceef80ad8810c8c9d8b6925ff493~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779396533&x-signature=Lwl7WIUyq7zP3PDQIBrCJuQ1D8Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2199441626640403","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.403398e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230448530D25D4520F1CC218AFE1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":99,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2830,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4233,"reply_count":2,"show
